fixed_items: Rewrote all six error_spotting tasks as short fragment-level corrections instead of full-sentence repairs.
Replaced duplicate and near-duplicate checks in the flagged clusters with distinct prompts covering different decisions and contrasts.
Strengthened the flagged MCQ distractors by replacing garbage options with plausible learner mistakes and cleaner task designs.
Updated the weak learner-facing translations in b1_theory_vowel_types examples to add explanatory value.
